scripts.dev: npm run clean:dev && npm run build:main && concurrently -k "npm:dev:main" "npm:dev:renderer" "npm:dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on --timeout 60000 tcp:127.0.0.1:5173 file:dist/main/index.js && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron .
scripts.build: npm run build:main && npm run build:preload && npm run build:renderer
scripts.pack:mac: npm run generate:icon && npm run build && electron-builder --mac --dir --publish never
scripts.dist:mac: npm run generate:icon && npm run build && electron-builder --mac zip --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:dmg: npm run generate:icon && npm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:arm64: npm run generate:icon && npm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg zip --arm64 --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:x64: npm run generate:icon && npm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg zip --x64 --publish never
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.main.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.renderer.json --noEmit
